text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
If I stumble here... how am I supposed to ever...
catch up...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Don't give up? Just saying that won't change
anything...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
choice_data_list: Let's figure out our next steps!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
choice_data_list: Let's figure out our next steps!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
But right now... the distance between us keeps
getting bigger... If I want to catch up...
choice_data_list: You'll need to persevere with your training.
You'll need to persevere with your training.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
If I give up now, the gap will only continue to
grow. So I won't give up...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Um... let's get back to training right away. I can't
afford to stand still.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I sense something brushing against my back...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel as if I've come into contact with its
emotions. They urge me to hurry after Manhattan
Cafe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As if to reflect the tone of her words, the air in
the room grows a little chilly...
choice_data_list: ...So, what do you need to do?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...I need to aim for the top... and keep moving
forward...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I must be hearing things. I feel like it's a sign
that I'm overexerting myself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that we both have determination to spare,
it's time to start planning for the next race.
